race.description: Valley Protective Service Country Boosted Mdn Hcp
race.comment: HEZANUFF (7) finds a winnable contest third-up with the 2kg claim. Ready for this trip after he gripped on late to secure fourth over 1190m at this track. Can race with cover from the draw and figure prominently. GRACEFUL WARRIOR (6) stepped up in trip at her fourth run back with a plugging third over 1400m at Armidale. Form sound and looks a genuine threat from the draw. JENNIBELLE (3) up in class and trip when covered plenty of ground for a courageous third over 1400m at this track. Better set-up today and can get off the mark. TOO HARD TO FIND (11) went out quickly and paid the price in the straight with a fading ninth over 1400m at this track. Earlier runs had merit and worth another chance.
